title: Sonnet 5 is LIVE And It Competes With Opus
summary: Claude Sonnet 5 is a new LLM release from Anthropic that closes the performance gap with Claude Opus 4.8 on standard benchmarks. The video evaluates whether Sonnet 5 delivers equivalent real-world performance gains despite improved benchmark scores.
writeup: The video covers Anthropic's release of Claude Sonnet 5, which closes the performance gap with Claude Opus 4.8 on standard benchmarks. It evaluates whether those improved benchmark scores translate into equivalent real-world performance gains. The central question is benchmark parity versus practical capability: Sonnet 5 matches Opus on tests, and the video tests whether that holds outside them.
